BusinessUnit represents multi-location architecture (Phoenix/Vegas/Denver/San Diego) - NOT unused despite 0 records
Table naming in Dataverse: EntitySetName is PLURAL (cr950_clients), LogicalName is SINGULAR (cr950_client)
Navigation properties are CASE-SENSITIVE: cr950_Project, cr950_Scope, cr950_client (varies by table)
VS Code continuity system: PROJECT_CONTEXT.json + session summaries replaces Memory MCP functionality
